evidence.excerpt: Callers, callees, impact, and query evidence captured.

notes: Payment adapter behavior remains PARTIAL because the example snapshot omits provider implementation.

evidence.excerpt: Order placement requires MEMBER and verified=true.
OrderService coordinates catalog, stock, and payment.
Payment adapter returns authorized or declined.

domains.name: Identity & Access
domains.purpose: Resolve member type, verification, and permissions.

evidence.excerpt: Verified member permission is checked before order creation.

domains.name: Catalog
domains.purpose: Publish products and determine product sale eligibility.

evidence.excerpt: Only ACTIVE products inside the sale window are orderable.

domains.name: Inventory
domains.purpose: Expose availability and reserve or release stock.

evidence.excerpt: Reservation is atomic and fails when available quantity is insufficient.

domains.name: Ordering
domains.purpose: Create and evolve orders through their lifecycle.

evidence.excerpt: Orders move PENDING → RESERVED → PAID or FAILED/CANCELLED.
Charge authorization returns AUTHORIZED or DECLINED.
Member has verified and suspended flags.
Product status controls publication and ordering.
Product state enum and transition service.

states.label: Pending
states.meaning: Order exists, stock not yet guaranteed

transitions.effect: mark order paid and emit event

evidence.excerpt: Adapter maps successful response to AUTHORIZED.

business_rules.name: Verified member required
business_rules.condition: member.role contains MEMBER and member.status == VERIFIED
business_rules.outcome: allow order request; otherwise reject before order creation

evidence.excerpt: Policy denies guest, unverified, or suspended members.
Only ACTIVE products can be ordered.
Current time must be within sale window.

business_rules.name: Only cancellable orders can be cancelled
business_rules.condition: order.status in [RESERVED, PAID] and fulfillment not started

evidence.excerpt: Cancellation is blocked after fulfillment begins.
Payment is requested after stock reservation.

business_streams.name: Browse products with orderability
business_streams.purpose: Explain why each visible product can or cannot be ordered.

steps.name: Open catalog
steps.action: Request visible products.

steps.name: Filter orderable products
steps.action: Return products that are active and inside sale window.

evidence.excerpt: Return products that are active and inside sale window.

steps.name: Attach availability
steps.action: Read whether at least one unit is available.

evidence.excerpt: Read whether at least one unit is available.

steps.name: Show orderability
steps.action: Show product plus orderable reason.

outcomes.observable_result: Each item has price and orderability reason

evidence.excerpt: Catalog query enriches products with orderability.

business_streams.name: Verified member places an order
business_streams.purpose: Trace member eligibility, product eligibility, stock reservation, payment, state transitions, and compensation from request to terminal result.

preconditions.description: Request resolves to a member identity.
productId, positive quantity, and payment token are present.

steps.name: Member starts checkout
steps.action: Submit product, quantity, and payment token.

evidence.excerpt: Submit product, quantity, and payment token.

steps.name: Check member eligibility
steps.action: Resolve member type, verification, and suspension status.

evidence.excerpt: Resolve member type, verification, and suspension status.

steps.name: Load product and price
steps.action: Read product status, sale window, and current price.

evidence.excerpt: Read product status, sale window, and current price.

steps.name: Is product orderable?
steps.action: Evaluate active state and sale window.

evidence.excerpt: Evaluate active state and sale window.

steps.name: Create pending order
steps.action: Create order with immutable product/price snapshot.

evidence.excerpt: Create order with immutable product/price snapshot.

steps.name: Reserve stock atomically
steps.action: Reserve requested quantity for order.

steps.name: Was stock reserved?
steps.action: Branch on atomic reservation result.

steps.name: Mark order reserved
steps.action: Persist successful reservation on the order.

evidence.excerpt: Persist successful reservation on the order.

steps.name: Request payment authorization
steps.action: Send amount and payment token to gateway.

evidence.excerpt: Send amount and payment token to gateway.

steps.name: Was payment authorized?
steps.action: Branch on gateway result.

steps.name: Mark order paid
steps.action: Record authorization and complete order.

steps.name: Publish order.placed
steps.action: Emit the completed-order event for downstream work.

evidence.excerpt: Emit the completed-order event for downstream work.

steps.name: Show confirmation
steps.action: Return order number and paid status.

evidence.excerpt: Return order number and paid status.

steps.name: Reject ineligible member
steps.action: Return MEMBER_NOT_ELIGIBLE without creating an order.

evidence.excerpt: Return MEMBER_NOT_ELIGIBLE without creating an order.

steps.name: Reject unavailable product
steps.action: Return product-state or sale-window reason.

steps.name: Fail order for stock
steps.action: Mark pending order failed with OUT_OF_STOCK.

evidence.excerpt: Mark pending order failed with OUT_OF_STOCK.

steps.name: Return out-of-stock result
steps.action: Return OUT_OF_STOCK and no payment request.

evidence.excerpt: Return OUT_OF_STOCK and no payment request.

steps.name: Record decline and release stock
steps.action: Mark payment declined, fail order, and release reservation.

evidence.excerpt: Mark payment declined, fail order, and release reservation.

steps.name: Return payment failure
steps.action: Return PAYMENT_DECLINED after compensation.

transitions.label: eligible
transitions.condition: member is VERIFIED and not SUSPENDED

evidence.excerpt: place-order.check-member -> place-order.load-product: member is VERIFIED and not SUSPENDED
place-order.check-member -> place-order.end-ineligible: guest, unverified, or suspended

transitions.label: orderable
transitions.condition: status ACTIVE and sale window open

evidence.excerpt: place-order.check-product -> place-order.create-pending: status ACTIVE and sale window open
place-order.check-product -> place-order.end-not-orderable: inactive or sale window closed
place-order.payment-failed -> place-order.end-payment-failed: order failed and stock released

transitions.label: published
transitions.condition: event accepted; response does not wait for worker

evidence.excerpt: place-order.emit-event -> place-order.confirm: event accepted; response does not wait for worker

outcomes.description: Product state or sale window blocks order

error_paths.retry_policy: User may retry after quantity change or restock.
No automatic charge retry; user may submit a new payment attempt.

compensations.action: release inventory reservation and fail order
compensations.restores: inventory availability; no paid order remains

business_streams.name: Cancel an eligible order
business_streams.purpose: Trace cancellation policy, refund/release compensation, and terminal order state.

preconditions.description: Member owns the order or has admin permission.

steps.name: Request cancellation
steps.action: Submit own order id.

steps.name: Is cancellation allowed?
steps.action: Check ownership, status, and fulfillment state.

evidence.excerpt: Check ownership, status, and fulfillment state.

steps.name: Refund and release
steps.action: Refund payment when present and release stock.

evidence.excerpt: Refund payment when present and release stock.

steps.name: Mark order cancelled
steps.action: Persist CANCELLED.

steps.name: Return cancelled
steps.action: Show cancellation confirmation.

steps.name: Reject cancellation
steps.action: Return policy reason without state change.

evidence.excerpt: Return policy reason without state change.

transitions.label: allowed
transitions.condition: own order and fulfillment not started

evidence.excerpt: cancel.check -> cancel.compensate: own order and fulfillment not started

compensations.action: refund authorized payment and release reserved stock

evidence.excerpt: Cancellation path inferred from explicit policy and handlers.

risks.description: Payment provider timeout and idempotency behavior is not fully evidenced in this demo snapshot.
risks.mitigation: Inspect adapter retry/idempotency implementation before change.

uncertainties.question: Is order.placed delivery at-least-once?
uncertainties.impact: Duplicate notifications or fulfillment work may occur.
uncertainties.resolution: Inspect event bus and consumer idempotency configuration.
